roles.title: Architect
roles.description: System exploration, requirements analysis, architecture planning, design documents. Focus: Understanding the big picture and creating the roadmap.

roles.title: Builder
roles.description: Feature development, main implementation work, core functionality. Focus: Building the actual solution based on plans.

roles.title: Validator
roles.description: Writing tests, validation scripts, debugging, quality assurance. Focus: Ensuring code quality and catching issues early.

roles.title: Scribe
roles.description: Documentation creation, code refinement, usage guides, examples. Focus: Making the work understandable and maintainable.

roles.title: Reviewer
roles.description: Code review, best practices enforcement, performance analysis, refactoring suggestions. Focus: Maintaining high code quality standards.
